# Gemini Media MCP

> All-in-one MCP toolkit for AI media generation -- VEO 3.1 video + NanoBanana Pro 2 images + prompting skills

## Overview

Gemini Media MCP is a monorepo containing 2 MCP servers and 2 Claude Code prompting skills for AI media generation using Google's Gemini platform.

## MCP Servers

### VEO 3.1 Server (servers/veo/server.py)
- 9 tools for AI video generation
- Text-to-video, image-to-video, video extension, frame interpolation
- Async job pattern with background processing
- API key rotation on quota exhaustion
- 3-layer download fallback (SDK, URI, ACTIVE wait)
- Supports 720p, 1080p, 4K resolution
- Supports 4, 6, 8 second durations
- Seed control and batch generation (1-4 videos)

Tools: veo_generate_video, veo_image_to_video, veo_interpolate_video, veo_extend_video, veo_check_job, veo_list_jobs, veo_api_status, veo_pricing_info, veo_show_output_stats

### NanoBanana Server (servers/nanobanana/)
- 4 tools for AI image generation
- NanoBanana Pro 2 — Pro (maximum quality) and Flash (fast) models
- Default 4K resolution
- Reference image support for consistent multi-angle shots
- Negative prompts, thinking level control, Google Search grounding

Tools: generate_image, upload_file, show_output_stats, maintenance

## Claude Code Skills

### VEO Prompting (skills/veo-prompting/SKILL.md)
7-layer prompt engineering for cinematic VEO 3.1 videos: Cinematography, Subject, Action, Environment, Lighting & Mood, Audio Design, Technical Controls.

### NanoBanana Prompting (skills/nanobanana-prompting/SKILL.md)
7-layer prompt engineering for photorealistic NanoBanana Pro 2 images: Style & Art Direction, Scene Description, Main Subject, Camera & Lens, Lighting, Texture/Material/Color, Negative Prompts.

## Requirements

- Python 3.10+
- google-genai >= 1.5.0
- GEMINI_API_KEY environment variable

## Installation

See llms-install.md for detailed installation instructions.
